case_title: ALIOTO, CATHERINE A. VS PARKING CONCEPTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALIOTO, CATHERINE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKING CONCEPTS, INC. $481.02 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $513.02, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL.
